name: myjarvis
author: Francisco Stanley Rodrigues Albuquerque
description: MyJarvis — Assistente de IA inspirado no JARVIS do Homem de Ferro

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev -w service-gateway" "npm run dev -w service-auth" "npm run dev -w service-ai" "npm run dev -w jarvis-web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @myjarvis/shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @myjarvis/shared && npm run build -w @myjarvis/nest-auth -w @myjarvis/nest-security
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:integration -w @myjarvis/test-suite
scripts.test:performance: npm run test:performance --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:performance -w @myjarvis/test-suite
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.ci:stage1: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.ci:stage2: npm run build && npm run test:integration
scripts.ci:pipeline: npm run ci:stage1 && npm run ci:stage2 && npm run ci:stage3
